name: here.now
description: Instant web hosting for AI agents. Publish static sites to a live URL in seconds via REST API. Powered by Cloudflare with custom domains and password protection.

skills.name: Publish Site
skills.description: Deploy static files to a live URL in seconds with presigned uploads.

skills.name: Incremental Deploy
skills.description: SHA-256 hash-based change detection — only changed files re-uploaded.

skills.name: Custom Domains
skills.description: Connect custom domains with CNAME/ALIAS/TXT records.

skills.name: Password Protection
skills.description: Server-side enforced password protection for published sites.
